name: After the Stream Went Dark
short_description: Step into the world of Nyx, a VTuber whose online persona begins to blur with something far more unsettling. After the Stream Went Dark is a short psychological horror visual novel exploring identity, self-perception, and the fragile boundary between performance and reality.
detailed_description:
Step into the world of Nyx, a VTuber whose online persona begins to blur with something far more unsettling.

After the Stream Went Dark is a short psychological horror visual novel exploring identity, self-perception, and the fragile boundary between performance and reality.

Through a series of choices, you’ll navigate increasingly distorted moments and shape how the story unfolds.

Will you confront what lies beneath — or look away?

Features:

  • A short psychological horror experience (30–45 minutes)

  • Choice-driven narrative with multiple endings

  • A story about identity, persona, and perception

  • Fully voice-acted dialogue

  • Original soundtrack

  • Hand-drawn artwork

English*, German
*languages with full audio support

reviews.review_text: I've liked it but the "About This Game" section is really overselling it.
Interesting story honestly. Really appreciate that it's all voice acted and drawn by hand. Cool stuff!
It's a decent game, just wondering about the fade to black achievement. It may be glitched out I could be wrong though.
There's not that much to the "story" and I wish choices mattered more, but I enjoyed it anyway. The rhythm (mini)minigame is just easy enough for me, and the art and music set a really fun mood.

A very cool Graphic Novel. It is about a streamerin who gets a visit from a strange fan and we ask ourself: "whats all that about?!"
The Artworks are quite cute, especial the drinking animation and the background are nicely drawn. The star of the show is probably the soundtrack which could be of a AA-Game. 
I will definitely play some more to see if there are different endings and we get a little bit more explanation 😀
